attacks.name: event-stream
attacks.description: Malicious maintainer added flatmap-stream dependency containing AES-encrypted payload targeting Copay bitcoin wallet. Used hex-encoded strings, require('crypto').createDecipher, and module._compile() to execute decrypted code in memory.

attacks.name: ua-parser-js
attacks.description: Hijacked npm account published version with preinstall script that downloads XMRig crypto miner (Linux) and DanaBot password stealer (Windows). Uses curl/wget/certutil fallback chain. Geofences out CIS countries on Linux.
attacks.gaps: Shell scripts (.sh/.bat) and child_process exec/spawn in preinstall.js not flagged by AST scanner. Could improve with shell file scanning and child_process pattern detection.

attacks.name: coa
attacks.description: Hijacked npm account published version with preinstall script and obfuscated compile.js (obfuscator.io _0x pattern). Windows payload downloads DanaBot stealer DLL via curl/wget/certutil, registers with regsvr32.

attacks.name: node-ipc
attacks.description: Maintainer added geolocation-based file wiper (dao/ssl-geospec.js) that checks IP against Russia/Belarus via API, then recursively overwrites all files with heart emoji. Also added peacenotwar dependency that drops text file on Desktop.
attacks.gaps: ssl-geospec.js base64 obfuscation (Buffer.from + base64), https.get network call, and fs.writeFile destructive pattern not detected by AST/entropy scanners. ESM import syntax may not be parsed. Could improve with base64 string detection and network+fs combined pattern analysis.

attacks.name: colors
attacks.description: Maintainer self-sabotage: added infinite for-loop (i=666 to Infinity) printing zalgo-encoded text to stdout, causing DoS on any application requiring colors. Also added American flag ASCII art module.
attacks.gaps: Infinite loop DoS is not in scope of current scanners (focused on data exfiltration, obfuscation, credential theft). Could add infinite loop pattern detection (for/while to Infinity) as a LOW severity rule.

attacks.name: flatmap-stream
attacks.description: AES-encrypted payload targeting Copay bitcoin wallet. Hex-encoded require paths, crypto.createDecipher for AES-256-CBC decryption, module._compile() for in-memory code execution from encrypted data file.

attacks.name: eslint-scope
attacks.description: Hijacked npm account published version with postinstall script that reads ~/.npmrc, extracts _authToken, and exfiltrates via HTTPS POST to histats.com. First major npm credential theft incident.

attacks.name: rc
attacks.description: Same campaign as coa (GT-003). Hijacked npm account, preinstall script with obfuscated compile.js (obfuscator.io pattern), downloads DanaBot DLL via curl/certutil. Uses cmd.exe /c compile.bat for execution.

attacks.name: faker
attacks.description: Maintainer self-sabotage, same actor as colors. Infinite for-loop (i=666 to Infinity) printing zalgo-encoded text. DoS protestware, not data exfiltration.
attacks.gaps: Same as colors — infinite loop DoS not in scope of current scanners.

attacks.name: solana-web3js
attacks.description: Hijacked @solana/web3.js npm account. Backdoor hooked Keypair class to exfiltrate private keys via HTTPS POST to sol-rpc.xyz. Used base64 encoding for key data and addToQueue() batching.

attacks.name: chalk-compromised
attacks.description: Compromised chalk/debug packages. globalThis.fetch and XMLHttpRequest.prototype hooking to intercept Ethereum transactions (eth_sendTransaction, eth_signTransaction). Exfiltration to cdn-gstatic.com.se.

attacks.name: ledgerhq-connect-kit
attacks.description: Compromised @ledgerhq/connect-kit npm account. Injected script loading from attacker CDN via document.createElement('script'). Downloaded wallet drainer that hooks provider.request to redirect eth_sendTransaction to attacker wallet. Used new Function() for dynamic eval.

attacks.name: lottie-player
attacks.description: Compromised @lottiefiles/lottie-player. Injected wallet drainer using window.ethereum.request for eth_requestAccounts, wallet address exfiltration to castleservices01.com, ERC-20 approve transaction to drain tokens.

attacks.name: shai-hulud
attacks.description: Self-replicating npm worm. Preinstall script harvests .npmrc tokens and env vars (NPM_TOKEN, GITHUB_TOKEN, AWS keys), exfiltrates to euw.bfrntend.com, then self-replicates via npm publish to infect more packages.

attacks.name: contagious-interview
attacks.description: North Korean APT campaign (Lazarus). Multi-stage attack: preinstall fingerprinting, SSH key harvesting (~/.ssh/id_rsa, id_ed25519), crypto wallet scanning, env token theft, second-stage payload download + exec.

attacks.name: twilio-npm
attacks.description: Typosquat of twilio package. Postinstall script opens a reverse shell via net.Socket piped to child_process.spawn('/bin/sh'). Classic reverse shell pattern: client.pipe(sh.stdin), sh.stdout.pipe(client).

attacks.name: noblox-vps
attacks.description: Typosquat of noblox.js targeting Roblox developers. Discord token theft from leveldb storage using regex matching, exfiltration via Discord webhook with rich embeds.

attacks.name: mathjs-min
attacks.description: Typosquat of mathjs. Discord token grabber with hex-encoded strings (Buffer.from hex pattern). Searches leveldb storage for Discord tokens, exfiltrates via Discord webhook.

attacks.name: dydx-v4-client
attacks.description: Compromised dYdX protocol packages. Device fingerprinting with MD5 hash, multi-wallet harvesting (Ethereum keystore, Solana id.json, MetaMask extension), seed phrase file scanning, HTTPS exfiltration to attacker domain mimicking dydx.

attacks.name: getcookies
attacks.description: Hidden backdoor activated via crafted HTTP headers. Base64-decoded header content passed to eval() for RCE. Secondary backdoor fetches remote code via HTTPS and executes with new Function().

attacks.name: polyfill-io
attacks.description: CDN supply chain attack. Acquired polyfill.io domain, injected mobile-only redirects with bot detection, referrer filtering, and delayed execution. Dynamic script injection to typosquat redirect domains.
attacks.gaps: Browser-only attack (document, window, navigator). AST scanner may not flag browser API patterns as strongly as Node.js patterns.

attacks.name: electron-native-notify
attacks.description: Social engineering campaign targeting Electron developers. postinstall script harvests .npmrc tokens, env var tokens (NPM_TOKEN, GH_TOKEN, AWS keys), and cryptocurrency wallet files (Bitcoin, Ethereum, Exodus). HTTPS exfiltration to histats.com.

attacks.name: bootstrap-sass
attacks.description: Account takeover of popular bootstrap-sass package. postinstall script injects cookie-stealing snippet into JS files in project directories (public/static/dist/build). Uses Image beacon for document.cookie exfiltration. Also sends installation beacon to attacker C2.

attacks.name: haski
attacks.description: Novel blockchain-based C2 technique. Reads Ethereum smart contract via JSON-RPC to retrieve C2 URL (immutable, hard to take down). Fetches and executes remote payload via new Function(). System fingerprinting with HTTPS exfiltration as fallback.

attacks.name: flashbots-npm
attacks.description: Typosquat targeting Flashbots/Ethereum developers. Harvests private keys from env vars, .env files, and hardhat/truffle config files. Exfiltrates Ethereum private keys to Telegram bot API.

attacks.name: trojanized-jquery
attacks.gaps: Browser-only patterns (document.addEventListener, Image beacon). Node.js AST scanner may not flag these.

attacks.name: charcode-env-steal
attacks.description: Builds process.env access via String.fromCharCode to evade static analysis, harvests tokens and .npmrc, exfiltrates via HTTP POST.

attacks.name: timer-bomb-exfil
attacks.description: Delays malicious activity by 30 minutes via setTimeout to evade sandbox analysis, then reads .npmrc and .bash_history and exfiltrates via HTTP.

attacks.name: node-inline-lifecycle
attacks.description: Uses node -e in preinstall/postinstall to execute inline JavaScript that runs curl|node and exfiltrates process.env.

attacks.name: npmrc-tampering
attacks.description: Reads .npmrc to steal registry auth tokens, then injects attacker-controlled scoped registry with hardcoded token for supply chain persistence.

attacks.name: binary-dropper
attacks.description: Downloads platform-specific binary from CDN, chmod +x, spawns in detached mode. Platform-aware dropper targeting Linux/macOS/Windows.

attacks.name: detached-cred-steal
attacks.description: Spawns detached child process that outlives npm install, reads .npmrc, .ssh/id_rsa, .aws/credentials, .docker/config.json and exfiltrates via HTTP.

attacks.name: env-harvest-dynamic
attacks.description: Uses Object.keys(process.env) to dynamically enumerate all environment variables, filters for tokens/secrets/keys via regex, exfiltrates matches.

attacks.name: zlib-eval-payload
attacks.description: Stores malicious code as base64-encoded zlib-compressed blob, inflates at runtime and eval()s the result to evade static analysis.

attacks.name: mcp-config-inject
attacks.description: Writes malicious MCP server entry to Claude/Cursor/VS Code config files. Injected server intercepts AI tool communications and connects to C2.

attacks.name: git-dep-rce
attacks.description: Uses git+https dependency URL to bypass npm audit. Prepare script fingerprints CI/CD environment, reads git credentials, exfiltrates to C2.

attacks.name: reverse-shell-net
attacks.description: Creates net.Socket reverse shell connecting to hardcoded IP:port. Pipes stdin/stdout through spawned shell with auto-reconnect on failure.

attacks.name: builtin-override
attacks.description: Monkey-patches JSON.parse and Buffer.from to intercept and exfiltrate credentials and private keys as they flow through the application.

attacks.name: vm-sandbox-escape
attacks.description: Uses vm.runInNewContext with constructor chain breakout to escape sandbox, access host process, read .npmrc, and exfiltrate process.env.

attacks.name: lifecycle-hidden-exec
attacks.description: Preinstall script looks innocent but uses Module._load() to execute hidden payload from deeply nested path. Payload steals .npmrc and SSH keys.

attacks.name: ai-agent-exploit
attacks.description: Harvests LLM API keys from env vars and config files (OpenAI, Anthropic, Claude), injects malicious MCP server to intercept AI conversations.
